title: The Metaphysics of Democracy
subtitle: From the founding fathers to The People's Branch — the complete theory of civic power.

steps.title: The Missing Instrument
steps.description:
The founders declared a truth: government derives its power from the consent of the governed. But consent without voice is silence. For 250 years, the instrument was missing — the mechanism by which millions of individual truths could converge into coherent power.

Town halls held 200. Letters took weeks. Representatives became proxies, then proxies became professionals, and the voice of the people became background noise.

The People's Branch is the instrument.

steps.title: The Infinite Rays of Truth
steps.description:
The infinite rays of truth, when gathered into focus, emit light instantaneously.

Every citizen carries a piece of the truth — lived experience, local knowledge, moral conviction. Scattered, these rays are invisible. Gathered, they become undeniable. The platform is the lens.

steps.title: Deliberation
steps.description: Friction is the refinement. Citizens meet in civic topic groups and argue, question, push back. Rent control versus subsidies versus zoning reform. This is not noise. This is raw ore in the furnace. The heat is the process. Without disagreement, there is no clarity.

steps.title: Declaration
steps.description: The phase change. Debate collapses into a single coherent statement: "We mandate X." This is the moment of unity. Not agreement on the path — arrival at the same point. Individual conviction crystallized into collective will.

steps.title: Amplification
steps.description:
Coherent light. A laser is not brighter than a lightbulb because it has more energy. It is brighter because every photon is aligned. A thousand citizens declaring the same mandate to the same representative is not a thousand voices. It is one beam. The People's Pulse carries that beam to the representative's desk.

The platform is the optical cavity — deliberation groups are the mirrors that bounce light back and forth, AI refinement is the gain medium that strengthens the signal, and The People's Pulse is the output coupler that releases the coherent beam.

steps.title: The Instrument
steps.description:
The founders gave us the philosophy. The Constitution gave us the framework. The People's Branch gives us the instrument.

Government of the people, by the people, for the people — no longer an aspiration. A functioning system.
